name: VOID HUNTER

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Soul Burn
abilities.text: When this model gains a Slow token, it may instead be dealt 2 irreducible damage.

actions.name: Existential Bite
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has no cards in its control hand, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Hole in the World
triggers.text: Place the target within 6" of its current location.

actions.name: Stutter Time
actions.effects: Give the target a Backtrack token. If this action receives a raise, place the target anywhere within 2" of its current location.

triggers.name: Leech Strength
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target. If it does so, this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Blurred Motion
triggers.text: The target gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 visible below artwork - this appears to be a station or set number
